name: Estates at Indian Springs
summary: A prestigious community featuring large homesites and custom homes nestled among mature oaks and Hill Country terrain. Indian Springs offers privacy and space with Comal ISD schools.

name: Bulverde Village
summary: A convenient Bulverde neighborhood close to schools and local shopping. Bulverde Village offers a balance of Hill Country living and everyday convenience for families.

name: Hidden Trails
summary: An established community with brick homes and a welcoming neighborhood feel. Hidden Trails offers some of the most affordable options in the Bulverde area with Comal ISD schools.

name: Johnson Ranch
summary: A master-planned community with resort-style amenities including pools, a fitness center, and miles of trails. Johnson Ranch is one of the most popular new communities in the Bulverde area.

name: Singing Hills
summary: A scenic community perched on the rolling hills of Bulverde with panoramic Hill Country views. Singing Hills offers a peaceful setting with larger lots and a true country feel.
